title: veronica brassii
intro: Veronica brassii, also known as the blue verbena, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of New Guinea. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Veronica brassii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Veronica brassii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
